entity.summary: China-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange represented by the catex.io trading domain and major exchange directories. HEI leaves launch_date unset because this review did not recover a sufficiently precise launch marker.
entity.notes: Two candidate source rows are collapsed into this entity. CoinGecko identifies China as the incorporation country and 2018 as the establishment year; launch_date remains null because this batch does not have a precise first-party launch marker.

evidence.title: Catex official exchange website
evidence.notes: First-party trading domain used as the current service identity reference.

evidence.title: Catex exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference corroborates the Catex exchange identity and identifies China as its incorporation country and 2018 as the establishment year.
